en: What keeps us healthy and happy as we go through life?
ko: What keeps us healthy and happy as we go through life?

en: If you were going to invest now in your future best self,
ko: If you were going to invest now in your future best self,
ja: 今、未来の最高の自分に投資するなら、時間とエネルギーをどこに使う？
zhTW: 如果你現在要為未來最好的自己投資，你會把時間和精力放在哪裡？

en: where would you put your time and your energy?
ko: where would you put your time and your energy?
ja: 最近のミレニアル世代へのアンケートで
zhTW: 最近有一項對千禧世代的調查，
vi: Bạn sẽ đặt thời gian và năng lượng của mình ở đâu?

en: There are lots of answers out there.
ko: There are lots of answers out there.

en: We're bombarded with images of what's most important in life.
ko: We're bombarded with images of what's most important in life.

en: The media are filled with stories of people who are rich
ko: The media are filled with stories of people who are rich

en: and famous and building empires at work.
ko: and famous and building empires at work.

en: And we believe those stories. There was a recent survey of millennials
ko: And we believe those stories. There was a recent survey of millennials

en: asking them what their most important life goals were.
ko: asking them what their most important life goals were.
ja: 80%以上がお金持ちになることだと答えた。
zhTW: 超過80%的人說他們的主要人生目標是變得富有。
vi: hỏi họ mục tiêu sống quan trọng nhất là gì.
